ItacPersonItem.Notes: Full name: Matteo il Maestro nella contrada di San Giacomo ai Quattro Elementi. Bertolo proposes that the book was printed by English typographers who used Wolfe`s material, after his death. See Bertolo, `John Wolfe`, in Rinascimento Italiano davanti alla Riforma (Vecchiarelli, 2004).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
